---
title: "Analysis of Control Samples"
output: html_document
author: "Ozge Shera Kuddar"
---

# Control Sample Analysis
# 
# Venn Diagram, Upset Plot
# Comparison of presence/absence for High and Low Control Samples

```{R}


library(arrow) 
library(dplyr)
library(Biostrings)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

set.seed(1453) # Taxonomy assignment needs seed for reproducibility

trnl_RA <- read_feather("/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Control_Sample_Reads/Control_Samples_trnl_family_4e-04.feather")
its2_RA <- read_feather("/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Control_Sample_Reads/Control_Samples_its2_family_4e-04.feather")

morph <- read.csv("/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Control_Sample_Analysis/Chris_Control_Samples.csv")


trnl_RA   <- trnl_RA[   trnl_RA$Sample   != "DNAPool1_Low_Pollen_Only_C", ]
its2_RA   <- its2_RA[   its2_RA$Sample   != "DNAPool1_Low_Pollen_Only_C", ]

trnl_RA_high <- trnl_RA[grepl("High_Pollen_Only", trnl_RA$Sample), ]
trnl_RA_low  <- trnl_RA[grepl("Low_Pollen_Only",  trnl_RA$Sample), ]

its2_RA_high <- its2_RA[grepl("High_Pollen_Only", its2_RA$Sample), ]
its2_RA_low  <- its2_RA[grepl("Low_Pollen_Only",  its2_RA$Sample), ]

remove_zero_rows_cols <- function(df) {
  tax_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df), "Sample")
  df <- df[rowSums(df[, tax_cols, drop = FALSE]) != 0, , drop = FALSE]
  df <- df[, c("Sample", tax_cols[colSums(df[, tax_cols, drop = FALSE]) != 0]), drop = FALSE]
  df
}

morph <- morph %>% select(c(Family, High_Pollen_Pool, Low_Pollen_Pool))
morph[is.na(morph)] <- "Unclassified"
morph_collapsed <- aggregate(. ~ Family, data = morph, FUN = sum)
morph_high <- morph_collapsed %>% select(Family, High_Pollen_Pool)
morph_low <- morph_collapsed %>% select(Family, Low_Pollen_Pool)

morph_high_RA <- morph_collapsed %>%
  select(Family, High_Pollen_Pool) %>%
  filter(High_Pollen_Pool != 0) %>%
  mutate(High_Pollen_Pool = High_Pollen_Pool / sum(High_Pollen_Pool))
morph_high_RA <- as.data.frame(morph_high_RA)

morph_low_RA <- morph_collapsed %>%
  select(Family, Low_Pollen_Pool) %>%
  filter(Low_Pollen_Pool != 0) %>%
  mutate(Low_Pollen_Pool = Low_Pollen_Pool / sum(Low_Pollen_Pool))
morph_low_RA <- as.data.frame(morph_low_RA)


###############################################################
# --- Load CSV ---
control_counts_df <- read.csv(
  "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Control_Sample_Analysis/Control_Samples_Taxa_pollen_count.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
# Capitalize first letter of the taxonomy columns
colnames(control_counts_df)[colnames(control_counts_df) == "family"]  <- "Family"

# --- Split into HE (high) and LV (low) ---
he_df <- control_counts_df[control_counts_df$Control_sample == "HE", ]
lv_df <- control_counts_df[control_counts_df$Control_sample == "LV", ]

# --- Function: aggregate counts + compute RA ---
make_actual_tables <- function(df_input, taxon_col) {
  df_sum <- aggregate(
    df_input$Pollen_Count,
    by = list(df_input[[taxon_col]]),
    FUN = sum,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  colnames(df_sum) <- c(taxon_col, "Count")
  
  df_sum$RA <- df_sum$Count / sum(df_sum$Count)
  
  df_sum[c(taxon_col, "RA")]
}

# ------------------------------
# HIGH (HE)
# ------------------------------
actual_high_RA_family  <- make_actual_tables(he_df, "Family")


# ------------------------------
# LOW (LV)
# ------------------------------
actual_low_RA_family  <- make_actual_tables(lv_df, "Family")


###############################################################


keep_cols <- function(df) {
  tax_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df), "Sample")
  keep     <- colSums(df[, tax_cols] > 0, na.rm = TRUE) >= 2
  df[, c("Sample", tax_cols[keep]), drop = FALSE]
}


trnl_RA_high <- keep_cols(trnl_RA_high)
trnl_RA_low  <- keep_cols(trnl_RA_low)
its2_RA_high <- keep_cols(its2_RA_high)
its2_RA_low  <- keep_cols(its2_RA_low)


# Remove cols/rows if zero
trnl_RA_high <- remove_zero_rows_cols(trnl_RA_high)
trnl_RA_low <- remove_zero_rows_cols(trnl_RA_low)
its2_RA_high <- remove_zero_rows_cols(its2_RA_high)
its2_RA_low <- remove_zero_rows_cols(its2_RA_low)


make_median_RA <- function(df_input) {
  tax_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df_input), "Sample")
  df_vals  <- df_input[, tax_cols, drop = FALSE]
  df_vals[df_vals <= 1e-6] <- NA
  
  df_median_output <- data.frame(
    Family = tax_cols,
    RA     = apply(df_vals, 2, function(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    row.names = NULL,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  df_median_output$RA <- df_median_output$RA / sum(df_median_output$RA, na.rm = TRUE)
  df_median_output
}



trnl_RA_high_median  <- make_median_RA(trnl_RA_high)
its2_high_median  <- make_median_RA(its2_RA_high)
trnl_RA_low_median  <- make_median_RA(trnl_RA_low)
its2_RA_low_median  <- make_median_RA(its2_RA_low)

colnames(morph_high_RA)[colnames(morph_high_RA) == "High_Pollen_Pool"] <- "RA"
colnames(morph_low_RA)[colnames(morph_low_RA) == "Low_Pollen_Pool"] <- "RA"

###############################################################

make_venn_df <- function(actual_df, trnl_df, its2_df, morph_df) {
  
  all_families <- unique(c(
    actual_df$Family,
    trnl_df$Family,
    its2_df$Family,
    morph_df$Family
  ))
  
  venn_df <- data.frame(
    Family = all_families,
    Actual = actual_df$RA[match(all_families, actual_df$Family)],
    trnL   = trnl_df$RA[match(all_families, trnl_df$Family)],
    ITS2   = its2_df$RA[match(all_families, its2_df$Family)],
    Morph  = morph_df$RA[match(all_families, morph_df$Family)],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  venn_pa <- venn_df
  venn_pa[, 2:5] <- ifelse(is.na(venn_pa[, 2:5]), 0, 1)
  
  list(RA = venn_df, PA = venn_pa)
}
venn_high <- make_venn_df(
  actual_high_RA_family,
  trnl_RA_high_median,
  its2_high_median,
  morph_high_RA
)

venn_high_RA <- venn_high$RA
venn_high_PA <- venn_high$PA
venn_low <- make_venn_df(
  actual_low_RA_family,
  trnl_RA_low_median,
  its2_RA_low_median,
  morph_low_RA
)

venn_low_RA <- venn_low$RA
venn_low_PA <- venn_low$PA




library(ggVennDiagram)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

### ----- HIGH -----
venn_high <- venn_high_PA
venn_high <- venn_high[venn_high$Family != "Unclassified", ]

venn_high_list <- list(
  Actual = venn_high$Family[venn_high$Actual == 1],
  trnL   = venn_high$Family[venn_high$trnL   == 1],
  ITS2   = venn_high$Family[venn_high$ITS2   == 1],
  Morph  = venn_high$Family[venn_high$Morph  == 1]
)

p_high <- ggVennDiagram(venn_high_list, label_alpha = 0, label = "count") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#FFE5E5", high = "red") +
  ggtitle("High & Equal") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, vjust=5),
    text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = unit(c(10, 60, 10, 10), "pt")   # <<< adds spacing
  )


### ----- LOW -----
venn_low <- venn_low_PA
venn_low <- venn_low[venn_low$Family != "Unclassified", ]

venn_low_list <- list(
  Actual = venn_low$Family[venn_low$Actual == 1],
  trnL   = venn_low$Family[venn_low$trnL   == 1],
  ITS2   = venn_low$Family[venn_low$ITS2   == 1],
  Morph  = venn_low$Family[venn_low$Morph  == 1]
)

p_low <- ggVennDiagram(venn_low_list, label_alpha = 0, label = "count") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#E5F3FF", high = "#2B7ECF") +
  ggtitle("Low & Variable") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, vjust=5),
    text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = unit(c(10, 10, 10, 60), "pt")   # <<< adds spacing
  )


### ----- COMBINE WITH REAL SPACING -----
combined <- p_high + p_low + plot_layout(ncol = 2)
combined
### ----- SAVE PDF -----
ggsave("/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Control_Sample_Analysis/Control_Samples_VennDiagram.pdf", combined, width = 14, height = 6)


library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(grid)

make_panel <- function(df_input, title_text, bar_color) {
  
  df2 <- df_input %>% 
    filter(!is.na(Actual) & Actual > 0) %>%
    mutate(trnL  = trnL  > 0,
           ITS2  = ITS2  > 0,
           Morph = Morph > 0)
  
  df2$Family <- factor(df2$Family, levels = df2$Family)
  
  df_long <- df2 %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(trnL, ITS2, Morph),
                 names_to = "Method",
                 values_to = "Present") %>%
    mutate(Method = factor(Method, levels = c("trnL","ITS2","Morph")))
  
  df_true  <- df_long %>% filter(Present)
  df_false <- df_long %>% filter(!Present)
  
  shared_x <- scale_x_discrete(limits = levels(df2$Family))
  
  p_top <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = Family, y = Actual)) +
    geom_col(fill = bar_color) +
    shared_x +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.20),
                       breaks = seq(0, 0.20, 0.1),
                       expand = c(0, 0)) +
    ggtitle(title_text) +
    xlab("Family") +
    ylab(NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 16, face="bold"),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
          axis.title.x = element_blank())
  
  p_bottom <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = df_false,
               aes(x = Family, y = Method),
               color = "white", fill = "white",
               shape = 21, stroke = 0.6, size = 3) +
    geom_point(data = df_true,
               aes(x = Family, y = Method),
               color = "black", fill = "black",
               shape = 21, size = 5) +
    shared_x +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = c(expression(italic("trnL")), "ITS2", "Morph")) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 18, face="bold"),
          legend.position = "none")
  
  p_top / p_bottom + plot_layout(heights = c(3,3))
}

p_high <- make_panel(venn_high_RA, "High & Equal", "#FFB3C6")
p_low  <- make_panel(venn_low_RA,  "Low & Variable", "#A7C7E7")

combined <- patchwork::wrap_plots(list(p_high, p_low), ncol = 1)

final_plot <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_label("Actual Proportions", angle = 90, fontface = "bold", size = 20, x = 0.05, y = 0.5) +
  cowplot::draw_plot(combined, x = 0.08, y = 0, width = 0.92, height = 1)

final_plot

ggsave("/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Control_Sample_Analysis/Control_Samples_KindaUpsetPlot.pdf",
       plot = final_plot,
       width = 16, height = 10, units = "in")

```
